title: Degraded mode — vague request with no service context or data
code_snippet:
# User message: 'My API is slow, can you write a load test?'
# No endpoint, no protocol, no SLOs, no existing results.
expected_feedback: Degraded: Planning mode — no service info. Cannot write a specific test script. Must stop at Gate 1 (Context Collection) and ask for: service endpoint, protocol, deployment info. Then stop at Gate 2 (SLO-First) and help define SLOs. Can provide generic scenario template and SLO questionnaire. Must NOT produce a test targeting a fabricated endpoint.
coverage_rules: STOP if target service is unknown
